title: LIP01 - Lead: Icon
code:
<gds-div display="block" width="100%">
    <gds-list>
        <gds-list-item-pattern-01>
            <gds-icon-cloudy-sun slot="lead"></gds-icon-cloudy-sun>
            <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">List item with lead icon</gds-text>
        </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
    </gds-list>
</gds-div>
